overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The horse trots along a grassy path and crosses a set of railroad tracks midway through the clip.

agents.ego_description: riding horse at a steady trot through dark forest, illuminated by handheld lantern casting light on the grassy path ahead

entered.detail: tall pine trees silhouetted against the dark night sky forming the forest edge
tall pine trees silhouetted against the dark night sky forming the forest edge
narrow winding trail covered in grass and dirt cutting through the forest
warm yellow circular illumination on the ground cast by the rider's handheld lantern

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a horse and rider traversing a dark forest at night. The path is grassy and winding, flanked by dense silhouetted trees, with the only light coming from the rider's lantern casting a warm pool of illumination on the ground ahead.

events.description: horse approaches and steps onto railroad tracks cutting through the forest
horse carefully navigates across the wooden railroad ties and gravel bed

agents.ego_description: guiding horse across the railroad tracks, carefully navigating the uneven wooden ties and gravel ballast

entered.detail: wooden railroad ties with metal rails running perpendicular to the travel direction
crushed stone ballast surrounding and supporting the railroad tracks
simple wooden post fence running parallel to the railroad tracks

segments.scene_description: The horse and rider approach and begin crossing a set of railroad tracks that cut through the forest. The ground changes from grass to gravel and wooden railroad ties, with a wooden fence visible along the right side. The lantern light illuminates the textured surface of the railroad bed as the horse carefully steps across.

events.description: horse steps off the railroad tracks back onto grassy forest terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing ride along the forest path after successfully crossing the railroad tracks

entered.detail: grass and dirt trail continuing through the forest on the far side of the railroad

segments.scene_description: After crossing the railroad, the horse steps back onto grassy terrain and continues along the forest trail. The railroad tracks and adjacent fence fall behind as the rider proceeds deeper into the wooded area, with the lantern continuing to illuminate the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, nocturnal forest as a rider traverses a winding path that briefly intersects with a railroad crossing. It begins with the horse trotting along a grassy trail flanked by dense silhouetted trees, with a handheld lantern casting a warm pool of light on the ground. As the rider advances, the terrain shifts from grass to a gravelly railroad bed, where the lantern illuminates the textured wooden ties and a nearby fence. The scene then transitions back to soft grass as the horse steps off the tracks and leaves the railroad behind. Finally, the camera continues to follow the rider deeper into the wooded area, with the lantern remaining the sole source of light against the surrounding darkness.
